name: soldier-battlefield
description: Soldier walking a dark night battlefield; profile silhouette against dead trees.
source_artifacts: Visual inspection of frames 1, 12 and 24 found pre-existing cyan/white rim lighting and sharpening along the soldier, head wrap, shoulders and sword. The source also contains baked video-player controls/text and mild motion blur; a bright edge at these locations is not automatically a warp halo.
